column1: ## (3) regulatorGeneName. Gene(s) coding for the TF

## (7) function. Regulatory Function of the Regulator on the regulated Gene (+ activator, - repressor, -+ dual, ? unknown)
## (8) confidenceLevel. RI confidence level based on its evidence (Values: Confirmed[C], Strong[S], Weak[W], Unknown[?])
